section.name: Ordinary types that do not start with "T"
Exception types that do not start with "E"
Pointer types that do not start with "P"
Interface types that do not start with "I"
Class fields that are not declared in the private section
Class fields that are exposed by properties (read/write) but do not start with "F"
Properties to method pointers that do not start with "On/Before/After"
Functions that are exposed by properties (read) but do not start with "Get"
Procedures that are exposed by properties (write) but do not start with "Set"
Classes that have visible constructors with bad names
Classes that have visible destructors with bad names
Identifiers that have unsuitable names
Multiple with-variables
Property access methods that are not private/protected
Hard to read identifier names
Label usage
Bad class visibility order
Identifiers with numerals
Local identifiers that "shadow" outer scope identifiers
Local identifiers that "shadow" class members
Class/member name collision
Class fields that are not declared in the private/protected sections
Class fields that do not start with "F"
Old-style function result variable
With statements
Private can be changed to strict private
Protected can be changed to strict protected
